artist: NASA Earth Observatory images by Joshua Stevens and Jesse Allen, using Landsat data from the U.S. Geological Survey
title: The Advance of Hubbard Glacier — Landsat 8 OLI, 22 July 2014
description: Landsat 8 Operational Land Imager satellite image from 22 July 2014 showing the Hubbard Glacier system in southeast Alaska/Yukon with Russell Fjord visible to the south. Documents Hubbard's sustained advance — one of the few major tidewater glaciers in the world still advancing rather than retreating.
alt: Landsat 8 satellite image of Hubbard Glacier and surrounding St. Elias Mountains with Russell Fjord to the south
verifiedBySession: 2026-04-12 — downloaded from science.nasa.gov Earth Observatory image 85900 and visually confirmed
